offer: For property managers processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating accurate payroll compliance reports on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts about payroll workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation and dashboard access on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
